label: multilinear algebra
evidence: Dedicated Mathlib folder for multilinear maps/forms (273 decls), the standard formal home for the field.

label: operator theory
evidence: Bounded/adjoint operators on Hilbert spaces (1836 decls) is the core of operator theory formalized in Mathlib.

label: operator theory
evidence: C*-algebras and operator algebra theory (1326 decls) is a core operator-theory subfield formalized here.

label: differential topology
evidence: Smooth manifold foundations (3151 decls) is the closest Mathlib container to differential topology, though Morse/transversality theory itself is thin.

label: diophantine approximation
evidence: Dedicated Mathlib folder matching the field name exactly (rational approximation of reals, continued fractions).

label: tensor analysis
evidence: Algebraic tensor-product foundations are formalized here, but classical tensor-calculus-on-manifolds is not well developed in Mathlib.
